name: LOST EPIC
notes: Second bring-up target. Dump path: Games/PPSA07429-extracted/. Boots through module linking and AGC map calls; tn3VlD0hG60#k#N returns a 1MB mapped buffer. Crashes writing [RAX] with RAX=0 at RIP 0x800e27823 (instruction bytes 48 89 00 = mov [rax],rax) immediately after the AGC mapping sequence — the AGC memory contract (what the mapped buffer must contain / which out-params the caller expects filled) is not yet honored. Phase-4 re-check 2026-07-19 (ppsa07429_run3.log): identical wall, unchanged — same RIP, same null-RAX store. Log refs: ppsa07429_run3.log (latest), ppsa07429_run2.log.
